devMessage:
Thanks for using my mod!
In this devlog you can find the latest news, updates, and some behind-the-scenes information about the development process.
If you have any suggestions or want to report a bug, please do so on the mod page (Steam Guides or Nexus Mods).

groups.title: Timers
groups.description: Change mission and task time limits. Original game value is 1x; mod default is 2x.

groups.title: Research Cost
groups.description: Change the money and research point cost for unlocking LessMicro automation.

EnableAutoComplete.label: Enable LessMicro Automation
EnableAutoComplete.description: Automatically handle supported low-interaction mission tasks after the required automation research is unlocked.

ExtendMissionTimers.label: Extend Mission Timers
ExtendMissionTimers.description: Increase mission and task timers once when they become active.

MissionTimerMultiplier.label: Timer Multiplier
MissionTimerMultiplier.description: Multiplies active mission/task timers. Original game value is 1x; mod default is 2x.

AutomationMoneyCost.label: Automation Money Cost
AutomationMoneyCost.description: Money cost for each department automation research.

AutomationResearchPointCost.label: Automation Research Point Cost
AutomationResearchPointCost.description: Research point cost for each department automation research.

EnableAssignmentLearning.label: Assignment Learning
EnableAssignmentLearning.description: Learn class-based assignment rules from manual vehicle and employee assignments.

AssignmentLearningConfirmSeconds.label: Learning Confirm Delay
AssignmentLearningConfirmSeconds.description: Seconds to wait before confirming a manual assignment for learning.

LearnedAssignmentRules.label: Learned Assignment Rules
LearnedAssignmentRules.description: Internal class-based assignment rules learned from manual assignments.

AssignmentSweepIntervalSeconds.label: Fallback Assignment Check Interval
AssignmentSweepIntervalSeconds.description: Fallback interval for periodic assignment checks. Higher values reduce overhead.

AssignmentBackoffSeconds.label: Blocked Assignment Backoff
AssignmentBackoffSeconds.description: Seconds before retrying the same blocked task/vehicle assignment.

FollowupAssignmentDelaySeconds.label: Follow-Up Assignment Delay
FollowupAssignmentDelaySeconds.description: Delay before assigning follow-up tasks after vehicles are already at a mission.

FollowupAssignmentJitterSeconds.label: Follow-Up Delay Jitter
FollowupAssignmentJitterSeconds.description: Small stable delay variation to avoid many assignments firing in the same frame.

ArrivalAssignmentDelaySeconds.label: Arrival Assignment Delay
ArrivalAssignmentDelaySeconds.description: Delay before assigning tasks after the first vehicle arrives.

TaskSwitchAssignmentDelaySeconds.label: Next Task Assignment Delay
TaskSwitchAssignmentDelaySeconds.description: Delay before assigning the next task after a mission task completes.

MissionReassignCooldownSeconds.label: Mission Reassign Cooldown
MissionReassignCooldownSeconds.description: Minimum seconds between assignment bursts for the same mission.

AutoAssignmentConfirmSeconds.label: Auto Assignment Confirm Delay
AutoAssignmentConfirmSeconds.description: Seconds to wait before confirming whether an automatic assignment was accepted.

MaxVehiclesPerMissionAssignPass.label: Max Vehicles per Assignment Pass
MaxVehiclesPerMissionAssignPass.description: Maximum vehicles scanned during one mission assignment pass. Lower values can reduce lag.

MaxMissionTasksPerSweep.label: Max Tasks per Sweep
MaxMissionTasksPerSweep.description: Maximum open mission tasks processed during each fallback sweep.

EnableVerboseLogging.label: Verbose Logging
EnableVerboseLogging.description: Write detailed debug traces to BepInEx/LogOutput.log.

ShowDebugOverlay.label: Debug Overlay
ShowDebugOverlay.description: Show recent LessMicro debug messages in-game.

EnableVehicleStateDiagnostics.label: Vehicle State Diagnostics
EnableVehicleStateDiagnostics.description: Write vehicle state snapshots for assignment debugging. Keep disabled for normal play.

EnableAssignmentDiagnostics.label: Assignment Diagnostics
EnableAssignmentDiagnostics.description: Write throttled assignment decision diagnostics. Disable after investigating issues.
